summary: Iteration 28: Strategy-Aware Auto-Reinvest Testing - All 24 tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) PORTFOLIO_STRATEGIES config has correct scoring types for all 6 strategies, (2) _passes_screener enforces strategy-specific filters (value: pe<20, pb<3, de<0.5; long_term: mc>10000Cr, roe>15%), (3) _score_by_strategy rewards thesis-consistent metrics (momentum=high 3M return, oversold=low RSI, value=low PE), (4) Dividend yield scoring caps at 15 points (yfinance bug fix), (5) Portfolio overview shows 6 healthy portfolios with NAV 310.4L (+3.68%), (6) Reconciled holdings: POWERGRID in bespoke (MOMENTUM), ONGC in quick_entry (BREAKOUT), WIPRO in value_stocks (VALUE).

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 28 verified the strategy-aware auto-reinvest implementation. Key findings: (1) PORTFOLIO_STRATEGIES config correctly maps 6 strategies to scoring types: bespoke=momentum, quick_entry=breakout, long_term=blue_chip, swing=oversold, alpha_generator=contrarian, value_stocks=value. (2) _passes_screener enforces strategy-specific filters: value_stocks requires pe<20, pb<3, de<0.5 (fractional); long_term requires mc>10000Cr, roe>15%. (3) _score_by_strategy rewards thesis-consistent metrics: momentum rewards high 3M returns, oversold rewards low RSI, value rewards low PE. (4) Dividend yield scoring caps at 15 points (handles yfinance percent-vs-fraction bug). (5) Reconciled holdings show strategy-appropriate picks: POWERGRID in bespoke (MOMENTUM, 3M 24.29%), ONGC in quick_entry (BREAKOUT, 3M 19.26%), WIPRO in value_stocks (VALUE, score 4175.57). (6) Portfolio overview: 6 portfolios, NAV 310.4L, Total Return +11.04L (+3.68%), all P&L invariants hold.
